steps: Go to https://app.chatwoot.com and log in (or create a free account; alternatively use a self-hosted instance)
Click your avatar image in the bottom-left corner of the screen to open the profile menu
Scroll to the bottom of the Profile Settings page
Your Personal Access Token is shown under the 'Access Token' section
Click the copy icon to copy the token

credential_fields.name: api_key
credential_fields.label: Access Token
credential_fields.description: Your Chatwoot Personal Access Token, sent in the 'api_access_token' request header

notes: Free cloud plan available at app.chatwoot.com; self-hosted version is open-source (MIT license)
The access token is a user-specific token — it has the same permissions as the user's account role
Administrator privileges are required to access certain API endpoints (e.g., creating agents, inboxes)
The token can be regenerated from Profile Settings; regenerating invalidates all existing API integrations
For self-hosted instances, replace the base URL with your own domain (e.g., https://your-chatwoot.example.com)

test_endpoint.description: Note: Use GET /api/v1/profile with api_access_token header to verify credentials for the authenticated user
